title: feat(pg, rag): add full-text and hybrid search support to RAG vector query tool
summary: Adds full-text search and hybrid (vector + keyword) search to @mastra/pg and the RAG vector query tool. Introduces SearchMode type ('vector'|'fulltext'|'hybrid'), HybridConfig for fusion weights, a content TEXT column + GIN tsvector index on PgVector.createIndex, fulltext/hybrid query routing in PgVector.query, and embedding skip optimization for fulltext mode. Includes 16 integration tests for PG full-text search and 6 unit tests for RAG tool parameter forwarding. All new params are optional and backward compatible.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community contribution addressing issue #10453 (labeled 'help wanted', 'p: low', 'effort:high'). LekoArts requested splitting the changeset into three files — this was done and all review threads are resolved, but the review status still shows CHANGES_REQUESTED. The PR currently has merge conflicts that need rebasing. CI shows MCP tests failing and core/E2E/Memory/RAG tests stuck in pending (likely due to secrets gating for external contributors). Vercel deploys need authorization. Documentation checklist item is unchecked — docs will need to be added. The author's latest commit (Mar 7) addressed the changeset feedback. Needs: (1) rebase to resolve conflicts, (2) documentation updates, (3) re-review from LekoArts/DanielSLew/NikAiyer who are requested reviewers.
